calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEGUNDINA SAN JUAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled; 10 days to answer. Sanctions are denied. Plaintiff has cited no statutory authority that could support such an award, and Plaintiff has not followed the procedures of CCP 128.7. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
